addModal.title: Add Device
addModal.deveuiInvalid: DevEUI must be exactly 16 hexadecimal characters

assignModal.title: Assign Device to {{zoneName}}
assignModal.noDevicesSubtitle: All your devices are already assigned to zones. Add more devices or remove them from other zones first.

createZoneModal.title: Create Irrigation Zone
createZoneModal.zoneNamePlaceholder: e.g., Garden A, North Field, Orchard 1

kiwiSensor.removeSubtitle: This will unlink the device from your account.
kiwiSensor.intervalNote: Kiwi interval changes use LoRaWAN FPort 100. Enter whole minutes between 1 and 1440.
kiwiSensor.invalidInterval: Enter a whole number of minutes between 1 and 1440.
kiwiSensor.intervalPending: Uplink interval change requested for {{minutes}} minute(s).
kiwiSensor.failedToSetInterval: Failed to change Kiwi uplink interval
kiwiSensor.enableTempHumidityNote: Enable ambient temperature and humidity reporting using the interval entered above.
kiwiSensor.enableTempHumidityPending: Ambient temperature and humidity reporting requested. The command uses a {{minutes}} minute interval.
kiwiSensor.failedToEnableTempHumidity: Failed to enable Kiwi temperature and humidity
kiwiSensor.enableTempHumidityRequiresInterval: Enter a whole number of minutes between 1 and 1440 before enabling ambient temperature and humidity.

stregaValve.removeSubtitle: This will unlink the device from your account.
stregaValve.intervalNote: OSI sets the normal closed-box interval on FPort 11. The opened interval stays fixed at 2 minutes and tamper remains enabled.
stregaValve.invalidInterval: Enter a whole number of minutes between 1 and 255.
stregaValve.intervalPending: Closed-box uplink interval change requested for {{minutes}} minute(s). The opened interval stays at 2 minutes.
stregaValve.failedToSetInterval: Failed to change Strega uplink interval

zone.deleteSubtitle: All devices will be unassigned from this zone. This action cannot be undone.
zone.failedToRemoveDevice: Failed to remove device from zone
zone.noDevices: No devices in this zone yet
